items.q: What is the minimum and maximum door size?
items.a: We manufacture sliding doors from 600mm to 6000mm wide and from 1800mm to 3000mm high.
Standard production time is 10–14 working days after order confirmation and deposit payment.
Yes, we offer professional installation in Moldova. Please contact us for details.

items.q: Can I use the configurator price as a final quote?
items.a: The configurator price is a close estimate. A final quote is confirmed after our team reviews your order details.
We work with tempered glass, lacobel glass, mirrors, solid wood panels, MDF with veneer, and aluminum profiles.
